faq.title: 🛡️ Swiss Liability Insurance & Escrow Payout Protection
faq.summary: Everything you need to know about BlueX protection mechanisms for providers and clients:
actionPoints: 💼 **CHF 5,000,000 Liability Coverage**: Every booking completed through BlueX is automatically covered by Swiss General Commercial Liability Insurance.
🔒 **Escrow Protection**: Client funds are secured in escrow at booking time and released to provider within 24 hours of job sign-off.
🤝 **Dispute Resolution**: In case of scope disagreement, BlueX Mediation provides neutral site evaluation within 48 hours.
